name: Cold Email Generator
description: Generates 3 battle-tested cold email angles (Direct, Curious, Story-Led) from prospect details. Free, browser-based, no signup required.
agent_instructions: This is a browser-based tool. To use it, navigate to the URL and fill in the form fields: prospect_name, prospect_company, prospect_role, pain_point, your_product. The tool generates 3 email variations. For API access or integrations, contact the owner via email.
